'''Porter''' was the code-name of a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Spy/Legends|undercover agent]] working with [[Casement]] under [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] on [[Drunost]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
